creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 220815
Diff for python3 support for kmymoney port

Upstream accepted patch with python3 support (https://invent.kde.org/office/kmymoney/-/commit/a9722f40ec94bd7fdda078e393807dc1e78bbec3?merge_request_iid=44 ), so let's apply it downstream also not to wait for kmymoney release.
